title: Amethyst Additions
description: Enhances Minecraft amethysts with new items and features in vanilla style
body:
# Amethyst Additions 

This mod enhances Minecraft amethysts by adding new items and features in vanilla style.                            
Requires [Fabric Shield Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricshieldlib), [MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib), and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)


![Amethystadds Show](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b23b8425b301d8918d6862ca685315f76943e2d3.png)

## Main Features

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Amethyst Lamp**
> Emits light and particles; 

> Can be placed on different sides of the block.
- **Amethyst Block**
> If light provided from one of a sides, amethyst block will dispel it on special particles:
> 
> ![Amethyst Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/908673498b58f00da8a14f6d8c740f9f25bb8ae5.gif)
- **Colored Water Cauldrons**
> ![Cauldron Coloring](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bbdc4f036b4d50f6889dbf527ce436265f4359d.gif)

> Can be boiled;

> If boiled, will start to transform any amethyst blocks on top of them:
> 
> ![Amethyst Transform](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bda185c99d0a46564f6f5b93ccac03f7790f2d3c.gif)
- **Colored Amethysts**
> ![Colored Amethysts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ed8a07a68448fb2915b2c7fe02a70b5f10b897f.gif)

> Colored Amethyst Buds will grow amethysts same color as they.
- **Colored Allays**
> Duplicating allays with colored amethysts makes the copy with corresponding color:
> 
> ![Coloring Allays](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bcf767aaeed8257d171c23c703f84be67c256d8.gif)
- **Colored Enchantments**
> ![Colored Enchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dc5200055944cf5c917e14eb8eacb6d479c8637.gif)
> 
> First you'll need to craft the Amethyst Smithing Temlate of the color you want the enchantment to be;

> Then combine the template, enchanted item and lapis on a smithing table to change the color of the enchantment
- **Amethyst Shield**
> Will deal damage back to the attackers, but each attack will break one of its amethysts.

> To restore amethysts you can righ-click them with shield in your inventory

> You can enchant shield with mending, unbreaking or sharpness, which will also affect its amethysts 

> You can add amethysts of different colors to shield, to customise it
> 
> ![Amethyst Shields](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1531d793cbe0663bc56bc02968e2b6aa735ec96.gif)

</details>
